strings.panel.p1.narration.1.html: Of course, Radd can take damage as well as give it.
strings.panel.p1.bubble.center.html: Sigh, do we hafta talk about that?
strings.panel.p2.bubble.center.html: My lifemeter is represented by my name, which the player sees at the top of the screen.
strings.panel.p3.bubble.center.html: When I take damage, I lose letters until they're gone, and then I lose a life.
strings.panel.p4.narration.1.html: And trust us, Radd knows plenty about losing lives.
strings.panel.p4.bubble.center.html: Can I help it if my player really sucks?
